builder.exitText: Are you sure you want to exit the View editor? All changes will be lost.
builder.subtitle: Views control which assets are visible when applied. Define filters to scope search results, recommendations, and browsing to only the assets that match.
deleteConfirm.content: Are you sure you want to remove this View?
deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Remove {{name}}
loadError: Failed to load Views! An unexpected error occurred.
menu.makeDefaultTooltip: Make this View your personal default
menu.makeOrgDefaultTooltip: Make this View your organization's default
menu.removeDefaultTooltip: Remove this View as your personal default
menu.removeOrgDefaultTooltip: Remove this View as your organization's default
pageSubTitle: Create, edit, and remove your Views. Views allow you to save and share sets of filters for reuse when browsing DataHub.
prop.columnGlossaryTermDesc: Glossary terms applied to a schema field / column.
prop.columnNameDesc: The name of a schema field / column.
prop.columnTagDesc: Tags applied to a schema field / column.
prop.dataProductDesc: The data product the asset belongs to.
prop.environmentDesc: The environment / origin of the asset (e.g. PROD, DEV).
prop.hasActiveIncidentsDesc: Whether the asset has active incidents.
prop.hasDescriptionDesc: Whether the asset has a description.
prop.hasFailingAssertionsDesc: Whether the asset has failing data quality assertions.
prop.platformInstanceDesc: The specific platform instance where the asset lives.
prop.softDeletedDesc: Whether the asset has been soft deleted.
prop.subTypeDesc: The sub type of the asset (e.g. Table, View, Topic).
table.name: Name
updateOrgDefaultError: Failed to update organization's default view
viewForm.descriptionPlaceholder: This view contains certified datasets, dashboards, and documents for use by data analysts
